name: reasonweave-codex-plugin
description: Router-first ReasonWeave orchestration for Codex with native design, planning, debugging, review, release, runtime verification, subscription observation, access, evidence, and proof gates.

interface.shortDescription: Router-first orchestration with trusted runtime verification.
interface.longDescription: ReasonWeave coordinates Codex work with router-first delegation, native design/planning/debugging/review/release workflows, model and reasoning selection, trusted runtime metadata contracts, subscription-observed config reporting, access contracts, evidence gates, proof gates, and compact packets.
